title: SWATH_EAD-MS/MS tutorial dataset for DMED-FAHFA analysis
author: Kurizaki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset serves as a data analysis tutorial for SWATH-EAD-MS/MS DMED-FAHFA analysis.  It contains: 
 
 Raw data (.data, .scan, .wiff and .wiff2) acquired with DDA-EAD on SCIEX for MSDIAL analysis 
 Raw data (.abf and .wiff) acquired with SWATH-EAD for MRMPROBS analysis 
 Files (.msp) for DMED-FAHFA annotation 
 Files (.txt) containing SWATH precursor isolation window cycle information 
 Alignment result (.txt) output by MSDIAL 
 Compound library (.txt) for MRMPROBS created using the Alignment result 
 Data matrix (.txt) output by MRMPROBS 
 
 To follow the analysis procedure, please refer to the Tutorial_fahfa_swath_ead.pptx file in the folder.
